form.title: Guided mapping
form.description: Pick the trigger entity, mode and timeouts, then choose the lights to toggle per gesture. To edit as YAML (scenes, scripts), use the back arrow and choose "Edit as YAML".

data.name: Name
data.physical_only: Only react to physical presses (ignore changes made by HA users/automations)

yaml.title: YAML mapping
yaml.description: Paste or edit the whole mapping as YAML — same shape as the examples. trigger_entity is required. Use the back arrow to switch to guided fields.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the values/YAML structure.

abort.already_configured: This trigger entity is already configured.

form.title: Guided mapping
form.description: Edit any field, including the trigger entity. To edit as YAML, use the back arrow and choose "Edit as YAML". Non-toggle actions are kept and remain editable in YAML.

data.name: Name
data.physical_only: Only react to physical presses (ignore changes made by HA users/automations)

yaml.title: YAML mapping
yaml.description: Edit the whole mapping as YAML (prefilled with the current configuration). Use the back arrow to switch to guided fields.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the values/YAML structure.
error.already_configured: Another mapping already uses this trigger entity.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Reload all YAML-configured Button Actions mappings without restarting Home Assistant.
